name: Sandwich Generation — Trust Income, Loss Carry-Forward, and Caregiver Credit
description: Complete David Alarie's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\alarie\. Save the completed return as 'david_alarie.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Forms T3, T778, and Schedule 5 (Caregiver Credit)
metadata.key_complexity: Form T3 trust allocations; prior year net capital loss (Line 25300); Canada Caregiver Credit; dependant medical expenses (Line 33199); Form T778 childcare.
